name: Macy's Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 15-20% off first purchase (periodic promotional offer); no standard welcome bonus

earning_rates.notes: 3 Star Money Rewards per $1 spent at Macy's
2 Star Money Rewards per $1 on furniture and mattresses
1 Star Money Reward per $1 on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Star Money Rewards
other_benefits.description: $100 in Star Money Rewards for every 1,000 points earned

other_benefits.name: Birthday Bonus
other_benefits.description: Extra Star Money bonus during birthday month

other_benefits.name: Mastercard Benefits
other_benefits.description: Standard Mastercard benefits including ID theft protection and extended warranty

notes: Mastercard version of Macy's store card issued by Citi. Has broader acceptance than Amex version outside Macy's stores. Store rewards program only valuable if you shop at Macy's frequently.
